text:
ありがとーう！
何も知らずに火山洞窟なんかへ行かせて
本当にごめんなさい……

この報酬じゃ割に合わないとか
思ってない？

思ってても口に出さないのが
<%me>さんの
いいとこね！
これに懲りず、またよろし

Thank you so much! I'm really sorry for
sending you off to the Volcanic Caves
without knowing what I was getting you into.
I hope you don't find this reward, uh, lacking.

Well, you know what I really like about you,
<%me>? That you
wouldn't say so even if you were thinking it!

See you soon! Hope this doesn't turn you off
working for me forever!
